source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
ez-e-ki'-as (Ezekias):

(1) the King James Version Greek form of Hezekiah (thus, the Revised Version (British and American); Mt 1:9,10). A king of Judah.

(2) the King James Version Ezechiad ( /APC 1Esdras 9:14), called Jahzeiah in Ezr 10:15.

(3) the King James Version Ezecias ( /APC 1Esdras 9:43), called Hilkiah in Ne 8:4.
